/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib CMakeFiles/midi_test.dir/midi_test_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midi_test.dir/__/__/interfaces/qlcioplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midi_test.dir/__/src/common/midiprotocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midi_test.dir/midi_test.cpp.o -o midi_test.app/Contents/MacOS/midi_test -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtTest.framework/QtTest /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
